original_file: UKKA_Manage blood pressure for chidren and young adult on dialysis.md
title: Clinical Practice Guideline: Management of blood pressure in adults, children and young people on dialysis
summary: This guideline provides recommendations for managing blood pressure in adults, children, and young people on dialysis. It covers the rationale, evidence grading, potential conflicts of interest, and includes summaries of audit measures, research recommendations, and a lay summary. The guideline aims to support clinicians in making evidence-based decisions regarding blood pressure management for this patient population.
